metadata.task_title: Testing Account Creation and Login on SimpliSalonCloud

content.text: Go to the SimpliSalonCloud registration page at https://simplisaloncloud.vercel.app/register. Fill out the sign-up form with a test email and secure password. Submit the form and verify if the account is created successfully (e.g., successful redirect to onboarding or dashboard). Then log out, navigate to the login page at https://simplisaloncloud.vercel.app/login, and sign in with the newly created credentials. Check if the dashboard loads correctly. Report any validation errors or UI glitches.

Understood! I will navigate to the SimpliSalonCloud registration page, fill out the sign-up form with test credentials, verify successful account creation, log out, sign back in, and check the dashboard â reporting any validation errors or UI glitches along the way.
The `/register` route returned a 404. Let me try the root URL to discover the actual routing structure of the application.

The root URL redirects to `/login`. The app is in Polish (SimpliSalon). I can see the login form with a "Nie masz konta? Zarejestruj siÄ" (Don't have an account? Register) link. Let me click that to find the registration page.
Found the registration page at `/signup`. The form has 6 fields: Full Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, Salon Name, and Salon URL. Now filling out the form with test credentials.
